test.name: Read 10 keys metadata from pre-generated keys

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.
kw.msg: ${keysCount} = 10

kw.name: Execute
kw.arg: ozone freon ockrw -n ${keysCount} -t 10 -m -r 100 -v voltest -b buckettest -p performanceTest --percentage-read 100 --percentage-list 0

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return
